message.reasoning: Okay, the user wants me to count from 1 to 5, one number per line. Let me think. First, I need to make sure each number is on a separate line. So start with 1, then 2, 3, 4, 5 each on their own line. Let me check: 1, next line 2, next 3, 4, 5. Yep, that's right. No extra stuff, just the numbers each on a line. Alright, that should do it.
